summary.heterogeneous_policy: attention on gpu, kv bookkeeping on cpu

paged_attention.positioning: Local paged-attention execution model over RuntimeScheduler KV page tables; this is not a TensorRT-LLM or vLLM kernel.
paged_attention.input: decode batch request ids plus resident KV page table
paged_attention.decision: model page-table reads, contiguous page segments, prefetch hit/miss effects, and memory-pressure skips before TPOT scoring
paged_attention.metric: decode attention latency, pages read per decode step, non-contiguous segment penalty, prefetch hit/miss impact, TPOT

serving_impact.method: single-op p95 latency delta projected onto decode TPOT proxy
serving_impact.note: This is a serving-level projection from kernel p95 evidence; full serving validation should replay the selected kernel in the decode path.
